title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: A workflow that composes Claude Opus for planning and reasoning tasks with Gemini 3.5 Flash for frontend design and implementation. The approach routes each phase to the model best suited for it: Opus handles specification and integration logic while Gemini generates UI code more efficiently and aesthetically.
